reviews.comment:
Solo visite el sector baño , ya que iba de paso , pero a lo lejos se nota la muy buena atención del personal, y se destaca con 1000 estrellas la higiene de los baños ,lugar muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
I only visited the restroom area, as I was just passing through, but even from a distance, the excellent service from the staff was evident, and the cleanliness of the restrooms deserves a thousand stars. Highly recommended.
